created_features.Tenure_Group: Customer tenure grouped into four meaningful ranges.
created_features.Is_New_Customer: Binary flag for customers with tenure <= 12 months.
created_features.Is_Long_Term_Customer: Binary flag for customers with tenure >= 48 months.
created_features.Charges_Per_Tenure: Monthly charges divided by tenure plus one.
created_features.Estimated_Total_Charges: Monthly charges multiplied by tenure months.
created_features.High_Monthly_Charges: Binary flag for monthly charges above the dataset median.
created_features.TotalCharges_to_MonthlyRatio: Ratio of total charges to monthly charges.
created_features.Contract_Risk_Level: Ordinal risk level based on contract type.
created_features.Is_Electronic_Check: Binary flag for electronic check payment method.
created_features.Has_Internet_Service: Binary flag for customers with any internet service.
created_features.Is_Fiber_Optic: Binary flag for fiber optic internet service.
created_features.Total_Services_Count: Total count of active customer services.
created_features.Protection_Support_Count: Count of security, backup, protection, and support services.
created_features.No_Online_Security: Binary flag for absence of online security.
created_features.No_Tech_Support: Binary flag for absence of technical support.

removed_columns_v3.City: High-cardinality categorical column that causes excessive one-hot expansion.
removed_columns_v3.Zip Code: Pseudo-numeric geographic identifier; Latitude and Longitude are retained instead.
